scope.target: Executable commit-message and workflow closeout commit verification
constraints: Validate subject, required body sections, Workflow identity, and final AI trailer
Support merge commits and assessment trailers
Do not install local hooks automatically
non_goals: Commit on behalf of external teams

steps: Add GWT positive and negative fixtures
execution.last_completed_step: Defined the machine-readable commit contract, executable range validator, conditional quick-gate integration, and eight GWT cases.
execution.next_action: Proceed to AICFB-006 validator registry and workflow lifecycle semantics.

results.summary: Explicitly selected AI-assisted commits now fail closed on subject, final signature, assessment identity, and optional workflow section/identity violations.
results.residual_risk: Human-only versus AI-assisted authorship cannot be inferred safely, so range validation remains explicit and conditional.
